title: SiTime Q4 2024 Earnings - Record Revenue Growth and Strategic Outlook
text: SiTime Corporation released Q4 2024 earnings showing record revenue growth momentum heading into 2025. The earnings call highlights included strategic updates on the Renesas timing business acquisition, which is expected to generate $300 million in revenue within 12 months post-close, with 70% gross margins and roughly 75% exposure to AI datacenter-communications markets. The company's long-term financial model targets 25%-30% annual revenue growth, 65% gross margins, and 30% operating margins. Recent product launches including the Elite 2 Super-TCXO for AI data centers position the company for continued growth in high-margin applications serving the expanding AI infrastructure market.
